name: @salary-hijacking/db
description: Shared server-authoritative database schema contracts, DDL bundles, RLS/RBAC policies, seeds and completeness gates for the Salary Hijacking platform.

scripts.build: corepack pnpm run clean && tsc -p tsconfig.json && node ../../scripts/build/fix-esm-imports.mjs && corepack pnpm run validate:dist
scripts.typecheck: tsc src/index.ts --target ES2022 --module ESNext --moduleResolution Bundler --lib ES2022 --strict --noEmit --skipLibCheck --esModuleInterop --forceConsistentCasingInFileNames
scripts.validate:package: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); const pkg=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('package.json','utf8')); const required=['name','version','private','type','main','module','types','exports','scripts','salaryHijacking']; const missing=required.filter((key)=>!(key in pkg)); if(missing.length){console.error('[db] package.json missing keys:', missing.join(', ')); process.exit(1);} if(pkg.name!=='@salary-hijacking/db') { console.error('[db] invalid package name:', pkg.name); process.exit(1); } console.log('[db] package metadata validation passed.');"
scripts.validate:exports: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); const pkg=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('package.json','utf8')); const required=['.','./users','./payroll','./expenses','./growth','./community','./notifications','./schema/users','./schema/payroll','./schema/expenses','./schema/growth','./schema/community','./schema/notifications','./schema/users.schema','./schema/payroll.schema','./schema/expenses.schema','./schema/growth.schema','./schema/community.schema','./schema/notifications.schema','./package.json']; const missing=required.filter((key)=>!(key in pkg.exports)); if(missing.length){console.error('[db] missing exports:', missing.join(', ')); process.exit(1);} console.log('[db] export map validation passed.');"
scripts.validate:dist: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); const required=['dist/index.js','dist/index.d.ts','dist/schema/users.schema.js','dist/schema/users.schema.d.ts','dist/schema/payroll.schema.js','dist/schema/payroll.schema.d.ts','dist/schema/expenses.schema.js','dist/schema/expenses.schema.d.ts','dist/schema/growth.schema.js','dist/schema/growth.schema.d.ts','dist/schema/community.schema.js','dist/schema/community.schema.d.ts','dist/schema/notifications.schema.js','dist/schema/notifications.schema.d.ts']; const missing=required.filter((p)=>!fs.existsSync(p)); if(missing.length){console.error('[db] missing dist files:', missing.join(', ')); process.exit(1);} console.log('[db] dist export map validation passed.');"
scripts.schema:assert: node -e "import('./dist/index.js').then((m)=>{m.assertDbPackageCompleteness(); const report=m.getDbPackageCompletenessReport(); if(!report.ok){console.error('[db] schema completeness failed:', JSON.stringify(report.missing,null,2)); process.exit(1);} console.log('[db] schema completeness passed:', JSON.stringify({schemaDomainCount:report.schemaDomainCount,tableCount:report.tableCount,indexCount:report.indexCount,policyCount:report.policyCount,ddlStatementCount:report.ddlStatementCount}));}).catch((error)=>{console.error(error); process.exit(1);});"
scripts.db:validate: corepack pnpm run validate:package && corepack pnpm run validate:exports && corepack pnpm run typecheck && corepack pnpm run build && corepack pnpm run schema:assert && corepack pnpm run security:scan && corepack pnpm run privacy:check
scripts.db:migrate: node -e "console.log('[db] migration execution is owned by database/migrations; this package exports the validated dbSchemaDdl bundle.');"
scripts.db:seed: node -e "console.log('[db] seed execution is owned by database seed runners; this package exports validated seed metadata from schema modules.');"
scripts.db:reset: node -e "console.log('[db] reset is an environment-owned operation; package-level destructive reset is intentionally disabled.');"
scripts.db:backup: node -e "console.log('[db] backup is an infrastructure-owned operation; package-level backup is intentionally not executed here.');"
scripts.test:e2e: node -e "console.log('[db] E2E is covered by services/api, apps/mobile, apps/admin and migration consumers.');"
scripts.test:qa: corepack pnpm run db:validate && corepack pnpm run test
scripts.security:scan: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); const path=require('node:path'); const walk=(dir)=>fs.existsSync(dir)?fs.readdirSync(dir,{withFileTypes:true}).flatMap((entry)=>{const p=path.join(dir,entry.name); return entry.isDirectory()?walk(p):p.endsWith('.ts')?[p]:[];}):[]; const patterns=[/raw_financial_source_data_included\"?[,\s\S]{0,160}defaultSql:\s*['\"]true['\"]/i,/raw_token_included\"?[,\s\S]{0,160}defaultSql:\s*['\"]true['\"]/i,/raw_secret_included\"?[,\s\S]{0,160}defaultSql:\s*['\"]true['\"]/i,/raw_pii_included\"?[,\s\S]{0,160}defaultSql:\s*['\"]true['\"]/i,/ads_payload_linked\"?[,\s\S]{0,160}defaultSql:\s*['\"]true['\"]/i,/community_payload_linked\"?[,\s\S]{0,160}defaultSql:\s*['\"]true['\"]/i]; const bad=[]; for(const file of walk('src')){const source=fs.readFileSync(file,'utf8'); for(const pattern of patterns){if(pattern.test(source)) bad.push(file+' :: '+pattern);}} if(bad.length){console.error('[db] security source policy violation'); console.error(bad.join('\n')); process.exit(1);} console.log('[db] security source policy scan passed.');"
scripts.privacy:check: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); const pkg=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('package.json','utf8')); const c=pkg.salaryHijacking; const bad=[]; for(const key of ['rawFinancialDataInAuthAllowed','rawFinancialDataInCommunityPayloadAllowed','rawFinancialDataInAdsEventAllowed','rawFinancialDataInNotificationPayloadAllowed','rawFinancialDataInLogsAllowed','rawTokenInResponseAllowed','rawSecretInResponseAllowed','rawPiiInLogsAllowed','browserDirectDatabaseAccessAllowed']){ if(c.securityContract[key]!==false) bad.push('securityContract.'+key); } if(c.calculationContract.currency!=='KRW') bad.push('calculationContract.currency'); if(c.calculationContract.moneyScale!==0) bad.push('calculationContract.moneyScale'); if(c.calculationContract.dbMoneySourceType!=='BIGINT') bad.push('calculationContract.dbMoneySourceType'); if(c.calculationContract.serverAuthorityRequired!==true) bad.push('calculationContract.serverAuthorityRequired'); if(c.calculationContract.negativeMoneyInputAllowed!==false) bad.push('calculationContract.negativeMoneyInputAllowed'); if(c.calculationContract.decimalMoneyInputAllowed!==false) bad.push('calculationContract.decimalMoneyInputAllowed'); if(c.calculationContract.dailyBudgetOverAmountEnabled!==true) bad.push('calculationContract.dailyBudgetOverAmountEnabled'); if(c.calculationContract.clientFinalCalculationAllowed!==false) bad.push('calculationContract.clientFinalCalculationAllowed'); if(c.calculationContract.idempotencyRequiredForWrites!==true) bad.push('calculationContract.idempotencyRequiredForWrites'); if(c.dataSeparationContract.adsFinancialRawJoinAllowed!==false) bad.push('dataSeparationContract.adsFinancialRawJoinAllowed'); if(c.dataSeparationContract.communityFinancialRawJoinAllowed!==false) bad.push('dataSeparationContract.communityFinancialRawJoinAllowed'); if(c.dataSeparationContract.notificationFinancialRawPayloadAllowed!==false) bad.push('dataSeparationContract.notificationFinancialRawPayloadAllowed'); if(c.dataSeparationContract.growthFinancialRawPayloadAllowed!==false) bad.push('dataSeparationContract.growthFinancialRawPayloadAllowed'); if(bad.length){console.error('[db] privacy/calculation contract violation:', bad.join(', ')); process.exit(1);} console.log('[db] privacy and calculation contract check passed.');"
scripts.docs:build: node -e "console.log('[db] schema docs are generated by the repository docs pipeline from dbSchemaDdl and completeness reports.');"
scripts.quality: corepack pnpm run db:validate && corepack pnpm run test && corepack pnpm run docs:lint && corepack pnpm run docs:build
